response:
Dear Team,

I wanted to let you know that today is my last day at the company. I have truly appreciated your support, collaboration, and friendship over the past few years. Working alongside such talented and dedicated individuals has been an incredible experience that I will always cherish. Although I am excited about my next adventure, I will miss our daily interactions and shared achievements. Thank you all for making this workplace feel like a second home.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
